query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN taskStatus != 'sem_tarefa' AND taskStatus IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_tarefa,
  SUM(CASE WHEN taskStatus = 'sem_tarefa' OR taskStatus IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sem_tarefa,
  SUM(CASE WHEN taskStatus = 'entregue' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as entregues,
  SUM(CASE WHEN taskStatus = 'nao_entregue' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as nao_entregues,
  SUM(CASE WHEN taskStatus = 'validada' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as validadas
FROM mentoring_sessions;

  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN taskStatus != 'sem_tarefa' AND taskStatus IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_tarefa,
  SUM(CASE WHEN taskStatus = 'sem_tarefa' OR taskStatus IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sem_tarefa,
  SUM(CASE WHEN taskStatus = 'entregue' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as entregues,
  SUM(CASE WHEN taskStatus = 'nao_entregue' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as nao_entregues,
  SUM(CASE WHEN taskStatus = 'validada' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as validadas
FROM mentoring_sessions;
